title: Duuu
description: Minimalist and grid-based design for an online radio.
credits: Spassky Fischer Frédéric Jaman Manon Bruet Quentin Creuzet

sample.fontFamily: NeueHaasGrotText-55Roman-Web, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, "Lucida Grande", sans-serif
